summary: Phase 3.7l GO-LIVE E2E Testing Complete. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified. All 5 roles login correctly. SEO titles correct (no 'React App'). Favicon and manifest.json properly configured.

issues: Found green color in consents page - should be CI-Blau only. Minor design inconsistency.

action_items: MINOR: Review consents page for green color usage - should use CI-Blau design
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All 5 roles login correctly: staff→/staff, applicant→/portal, partner→/partner, admin→/staff (with Admin tab), teacher→/staff
✓ SEO: All public pages have proper meta titles (not 'React App'): Homepage, /courses, /services, /contact, /apply, /legal, /privacy, /agb
✓ Favicon: /favicon.ico returns 200 with image/x-icon content-type (516 bytes)
✓ manifest.json: Has correct app name 'Studienkolleg Aachen – Way2Germany'
✓ Cookie banner: Shows and 'Accept All' button works
✓ Apply page: Has password fields and privacy checkbox for account creation
✓ Applicant Dashboard: Shows 'Willkommen zurück' (DE), Quick Actions (Dokument hochladen, Nachricht senden)
✓ Applicant Journey: Timeline page loads
✓ Applicant Documents: Upload functionality present
✓ Applicant Messages: Chat layout with input anchored at bottom
✓ Applicant Financials: Shows 'Zahlungsmodul in Vorbereitung' (MOCKED)
✓ Applicant Settings: Name input and language selector present
✓ Staff Dashboard: CI-Blau design, Kanban link works
✓ Staff Kanban: Shows 78 cards across columns, cards display applicant data
✓ Staff Tasks: Create task form works, filter tabs present (5 filters)
✓ Staff Messaging: Conversation list on left, chat area on right
✓ Applicant Detail: Shows Name/Email/Phone/Country (NOT dashes), Stage selector, Followups, AI screening panel with 'KI-Prüfung starten' button prominently visible
✓ Partner Dashboard: Shows stats (Gesamt Vermittlungen, Aktive, Eingeschrieben)
✓ Partner Referrals: Shows table/empty state
✓ Partner Referral Link: Has 'Kopieren' (Copy) button
✓ Partner Settings: Organization name, email, language selector, save button
✓ Tasks CRUD: Create, read, update, delete, notes, attachments (base64), history all working
✓ Cookie auth: SameSite=none, Secure=true working correctly
✓ CORS: API responds correctly to same-origin requests (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is empty = relative URLs)
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created: TEST_Phase37l: E2E Test Task, TEST_Phase37l: Full Workflow Task (with notes and attachments)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7l GO-LIVE E2E complete. All critical flows work. Login URL is /auth/login (not /login). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is empty (relative URLs). Cookie settings: COOKIE_SECURE=true, COOKIE_SAMESITE=none. Admin uses different password (${TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD}) than other dev accounts (${TEST_DEFAULT_PASSWORD}). Task attachments use base64 JSON format (not multipart). Kanban cards don't navigate on click - use action buttons or direct URL navigation.
passed_checks: === PUBLIC SITE / FUNNEL ===
1. Homepage loads with proper SEO title 'Studienkolleg Aachen – Your Path to University in Germany'
2. /courses, /services, /contact pages load with correct meta titles
3. /apply page has password fields and privacy checkbox
4. /legal, /privacy, /agb pages load correctly
5. Cookie banner shows, 'Accept All' button works
=== APPLICANT FLOW ===
6. Applicant login redirects to /portal
7. Dashboard shows 'Willkommen zurück' (DE), Quick Actions present
8. Journey page loads with timeline
9. Documents page has upload functionality
10. Messages page has chat layout with input anchored at bottom
11. Financials page shows 'Zahlungsmodul in Vorbereitung' (MOCKED)
12. Settings page has name input and language selector
13. Consents page loads (minor: has some green color)
=== STAFF FLOW ===
14. Staff login redirects to /staff
15. Dashboard has CI-Blau design, Quick Access links work
16. Kanban shows 78 cards with applicant data
17. Applicant Detail shows Name/Email/Phone/Country (NOT dashes), Stage selector, Followups, AI screening button
18. Tasks page: Create task works, filter tabs present, task CRUD functional
19. Messaging: Conversation list visible, chat area works
=== TEACHER FLOW ===
20. Teacher login redirects to /staff (teacher dashboard)
=== PARTNER FLOW ===
21. Partner login redirects to /partner, Dashboard shows stats, Referrals page, Link page with copy button, Settings page
=== ADMIN FLOW ===
22. Admin login redirects to /staff with Admin tab visible
=== SYSTEM CHECKS ===
23. Role-based access: Staff blocked from /api/partner/dashboard (403)
24. CORS: API responds correctly (relative URLs work)
25. Favicon: /favicon.ico returns 200 with proper content-type
26. manifest.json: Has correct app name 'Studienkolleg Aachen – Way2Germany'
27. No 'React App' in any page title
28. i18n: Applicant portal shows German text when language_pref=de

mocked_apis.ai_screening_inference: May return mock results if NSCALE_API_KEY not configured

go_live_readiness.notes: All critical flows work. One minor design issue on consents page (green color instead of CI-Blau). Platform is GO-LIVE ready.
